data.name: [red7cat] ElfWork
data.detailed_description:
Christmas is in danger. Mysterious forces have destroyed the elf village and kidnapped Santa. Miss Claus needs your help to rebuild the toy factory, find her brother and bring justice!

Fabulous Dickgirls

You'll meet a host of fairy tale characters - elves, spirits and monster girls, each of whom will appreciate your depth and warmth!

Restore the elf village!

Find resources and build new houses so that the villagers will come back! Their gratitude will be very HUGE.

Dangerous (and beautiful) enemies!

The forest is full of danger, so get ready to fight back against lustful futanari... or should you surrender?
data.about_the_game:
Christmas is in danger. Mysterious forces have destroyed the elf village and kidnapped Santa. Miss Claus needs your help to rebuild the toy factory, find her brother and bring justice!

data.short_description: An unusual combination of porn Futanari game, 2d side-scroller and city-building simulator. Explore the forest, fight enemies, get resources, build new houses to help Miss Claus save Christmas!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or later
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 125 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 compatible
